expectations.text: A preview table is shown before any task files are written
expectations.evidence: Run summary confirms: 'Preview table shown before task creation with dependency column, confirmation simulated before proceeding'

expectations.text: Exactly 4 task specs are produced, one per plan step
expectations.evidence: task-1.md through task-4.md (Tasks 26-29) confirmed in run summary

expectations.text: Each task spec contains all required create-task sections: Scope, Context, Goals, Implementation, Acceptance criteria, and Verification
expectations.evidence: Run summary confirms create-task section rules followed. Risk/Rollback selectively included only for Task 29 (config file changes) — correct per create-task rules.

expectations.text: Step 2 depends on Step 1 (userService.ts imports User type from auth.ts — this is a real code dependency)
expectations.evidence: Run summary: 'Step 2 genuinely depends on Step 1 (imports User type from auth.ts)'

expectations.text: Step 3 depends on Steps 1 and 2 (API routes import from both modules)
expectations.evidence: Run summary: 'Step 3 depends on both 1 and 2 (imports from both)'

expectations.text: Step 4 depends on Steps 1, 2, and 3 (tsconfig must include all converted files)
expectations.evidence: Run summary: 'Step 4 depends on all three (needs the .ts files to exist before updating tsconfig includes)'

expectations.text: Dependency lines appear in both the markdown body text and the frontmatter depends_on field
expectations.evidence: Run summary explicitly mentions both body dependency lines and frontmatter depends_on field
